notes: Trainers, we hope you’re enjoying your adventure in Pokémon GO! We update the app regularly with new events and features, so make sure to check the in-game News to stay up to date.

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

title: BitLife - Life Simulator
notes:
Let's get ready to rumble, Bitizens! The Ultimate Fighter Mode is now available for purchase. Head over to the BitLife Marketplace and start your journey to become the ultimate fighter today! Here's what's included:

- Choose a fighting specialty
- Brawl with randos on the street
- Compete in the Ultimate Fighting League
- Learn 100+ fighting moves
- SO MUCH MORE!

Hit us up on our socials for more info and updates. While you're there, send us your craziest moments!

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
notes:
NEW CHAMPIONS
Phyla-Vell
Descendant of the Captain Marvel lineage, Phyla-Vell uses her Kree and artificially created Eternal physiology to protect the cosmos. While fighting the Phalanx, Phyla became the Avatar of Death to save her romantic partner Moondragon, gaining new abilities and her new title: Martyr. 

Shatterstar
